---
title: '2014/05/21 Journal'
date: '2014-05-21T11:29:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1818216784564036231'
blogger_filename: '/2014/05/20140521-journal.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p><br>
Hebrews 13:15<br>
Sacrifice of Praise</p>
<p>My mom is still blaming Pastor Roberts for my not playing guitar. But it's not his fault. He played a role, but not a major role.</p>
<p>My problem with music and praise ... is that I often stand on the platform feeling like an impostor. That was a theme in my life long before and after Oasis Church.</p>
<p>I'm often, to this day, reaching out to God with one hand while pulling away with the other. I want to be able to be Super Christian some days, while inwardly longing for a smoke, drink, sex with multiple strangers on other days. Not all of me hates the old me. Some of me misses the old me... even though it was destructive. </p>
<p>I need help.<br></p>
